x-enumeration-literals.name: Policy Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensure the policy is valid and active

Examples in Funeral Insurance:
- Confirm policy exists and is in-force
- Verify sum assured and coverage type
- Check beneficiary details

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event Verification
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Confirm the insured event occurred and is covered

Examples in Funeral Insurance:
- Verify death occurred within coverage period
- Check cause of death against exclusions (e.g., suicide in first year)
- Confirm date of death

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Documentation Check
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensure all required documents are submitted and authentic

Examples in Funeral Insurance:
- Death certificate
- Medical records / hospital discharge summary
- Police or accident report (if accidental death)
- ID of policyholder/beneficiary

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Compliance Check
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Confirm claim meets all rules and regulations

Examples in Funeral Insurance:
- Claim submitted within allowed timeframe
- Complete and accurate documents
- Fraud indicators or inconsistencies checked
- Regulatory compliance (reporting large payouts)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Determine correct payout amount

Examples in Funeral Insurance:
- Calculate sum assured
- Deduct unpaid premiums or policy loans
- Apply optional add-ons (repatriation, tombstone, counselling)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Approval / Risk Check
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Ensure proper authorization and risk mitigation

Examples in Funeral Insurance:
- Reviewed by claims officer or underwriter
- Managerial approval for large claims
- Verification against anti-fraud and risk control policies

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Eligibility Check
x-enumeration-literals.description: The Claim Eligibility Check is a type of assessment used to determine whether a claim meets all the necessary preconditions for assessment and payment, based on the policy terms, coverage, and event validity.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim Entitlement Check
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Claim Entitlement Check is tan assessment that determines what benefits (if any) a claimant is entitled to receive under the terms of the insurance agreement, based on the verified event, coverage, and policy conditions.

A Claim Entitlement Check is the evaluation of the scope, value, and conditions of the benefit that the claimant is entitled to receive, once eligibility has been confirmed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Claim External Agency Check
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A Claim External Agency Check is an assessment involving an independent or third-party organization to perform specific validations, evaluations, or verifications related to a claim.
These checks provide objective evidence or specialized expertise to support claim assessment and decisioning.
